package rulecoverage

func PositiveGenericBaseRepositoryWithReflectionDispatch() string {
    ruleID := "generic_base_repository_with_reflection_dispatch"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Catch-all repositories that depend on reflection-heavy generic CRUD instead of bounded repository APIs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
